Big LakeBullies

Breeding the most extreme, structurally correct ABKC American Bullies — massive block heads, heavy bone, short compact frames, and family-first temperament.

Champion Bloodlines
FL
Ships Worldwide

Big Lake Bullies is a Florida-based American Bully kennel dedicated to producing top-quality ABKC dogs with elite structure, extreme mass, and the kind of temperament that makes them perfect family companions. Every dog in our program has been hand-selected for block head, heavy bone, and short, compact build.

Our dogs are raised in our home, socialized from birth, and come from only the best bloodlines. All pups leave with health guarantees, ABKC registration, vet checks, first vaccines, and lifetime breeder support. Ground and air transport available nationwide.

How to Reserve a Pick

Contact us to reserve your pick. A $500 non-refundable deposit holds your spot. Pick order is determined by deposit order. Balance of $3,500 due at pick-up. Serious inquiries only.
